message:
test(core): add unit tests for prophage-excision analysis

Add comprehensive test suite for prophage excision precision mapper:
- Tests for findIntegrases() with various gene annotations
- Tests for findDirectRepeats() with configurable search regions
- Tests for analyzeProphageExcision() including att core motifs
- Tests for isLikelyTemperate() detection
- Edge case handling for null fields and empty inputs

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
